    SELECT b."Id", b."Content", b."CorrectAnswerId", b."Image"
    FROM "BaseQuestions" AS b
    WHERE b."Id" = @id
    LIMIT 1
) AS b1
LEFT JOIN "BaseAnswers" AS b0 ON b1."Id" = b0."BaseQuestionId"
ORDER BY b1."Id"
